meta.name: description
meta.content: Established in 1897, we have our origins in India's independence and its subsequent journey of self-reliance. Today, our businesses serve over 1.1 billion consumers globally across a wide mix of industries.

div.p:
Established in 1897, we have our origins in India's independence and its subsequent journey of self-reliance.
Today, our businesses serve over 1.1 billion consumers globally across a wide mix of industries.
From July 2024, we are owned, operated, and managed as two distinct business groups: the Godrej Enterprises Group and the Godrej Industries Group.

Godrej Enterprises Group (comprising Godrej & Boyce and its subsidiaries) has a significant presence across diverse consumer and industrial businesses spanning Aerospace, Aviation, Defence, Engines and Motors, Energy, Locks & Security Solutions, Building Materials, Green Building Consulting, Construction and EPC Services, Heavy Engineering, Intralogistics, Tooling, Healthcare Equipment, Consumer Durables, Furniture, Interior Design, Architectural Fittings, IT solutions and Vending Machines.

Godrej Industries Group comprises the listed companies Godrej Industries, Godrej Consumer Products, Godrej Properties, Godrej Agrovet and Astec Lifesciences. Its businesses have a presence in Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG), Real Estate, Real Estate Private Equity, Financial Services, Oleochemicals, Animal Feed, Crop Protection, Oil Palm, Dairy, Poultry and Processed Food, and Facilities Management Services.
